scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,electron -c cyan,green,magenta "npm:dev -w server" "npm:dev -w client" "npm:dev -w electron"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server --if-present && npm run build -w client --if-present && npm run build -w electron --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
